title: malus yezoensis
intro: Malus yezoensis, also known as the Japanese mountain apple or Yezo crabapple, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, Rosaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Malus yezoensis include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Malus yezoensis is often used in tea, infusion, or tincture form to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
